note: All 6 missing LLM directories and stale counts (61→63 drummer files, 55→63 lick count) already added to public/llms/index.md in commit 5831a0d merged on 2026-06-20
body:
## Problem

`/llms/index.md` is the master index for AI crawlers discovering the LLM content surface. It is stale — missing 6 new directories and 2 stale counts:

**Missing directories (not mentioned in index.md):**
1. `/llms/brands/` — 8 brand LLM files (tama, pearl, dw, ludwig, zildjian, paiste, meinl, sabian)
2. `/llms/gear-comparison/` — 7 brand comparison LLM files (tama-vs-pearl, meinl-vs-zildjian, etc.)
3. `/llms/licks/<drummer>.md` — 63 individual per-drummer lick LLM files (only the hub `licks.md` is listed)
4. `/llms/technique/<slug>.md` — 10 individual per-technique LLM files (only the hub `techniques.md` is listed)
5. `/llms/gear-series/` — 36 per-gear-series LLM files
6. `/llms/endorsements/<slug>.md` — individual per-drummer endorsement files

**Stale counts:**
- "Per-Drummer LLM Files: 61 files" → should be 63 (roster grew with Derek Roddy, Gavin Harrison, etc.)
- Licks overview says "55 drummers" → should be 63 (100% lick milestone shipped)

## Fix

Update `public/llms/index.md`:
- Add rows to the LLM Resources table for each missing directory
- Update drummer count 61→63
- Update lick count 55→63
- Sample rows to add:
  ```markdown
  | Per-Brand LLM Files | https://metalforge.io/llms/brands/ | Per-brand gear guides for 8 major drum/cymbal brands (8 files) |
  | Brand Comparisons | https://metalforge.io/llms/gear-comparison/ | Side-by-side brand spec comparisons for 7 matchups (7 files) |
  | Per-Drummer Lick Files | https://metalforge.io/llms/licks/ | Individual lick breakdown LLM files for all 63 drummers (63 files) |
  | Per-Technique Files | https://metalforge.io/llms/technique/ | Deep-dive technique files: blast-beat, double-bass, gravity-blast, etc. (10 files) |
  | Gear Series Files | https://metalforge.io/llms/gear-series/ | Per-gear-model LLM files covering specs and user profiles (36 files) |
  | Per-Drummer Endorsements | https://metalforge.io/llms/endorsements/ | Individual brand endorsement histories per drummer (15 files) |
  ```

## File to touch

- `public/llms/index.md`

## Impact

- AI crawlers (ClaudeBot, GPTBot, Perplexity) read index.md to discover what content exists
- 6 directories = ~139 files currently undiscoverable via the index
- Distinct from #1457 (which refreshed vs/guides/brands/endorsements links but left per-file directories unlisted)

## Verify

1. `cat public/llms/index.md | grep 'brands'` — should return entry with URL
2. `cat public/llms/index.md | grep '63'` — should appear in drummer count and lick count
3. Crawl access: `curl https://metalforge.io/llms/index.md | grep 'brands'` ✅

## Done

- [ ] /llms/index.md updated with all 6 missing directories
- [ ] Drummer count updated to 63
- [ ] Lick count updated to 63
title: SEO: /llms/index.md — add 6 missing LLM directories and update stale counts
